title: The Death of 'Abd al -Rahman b. Jabalah al-Abnawi
description: In this year, 'Abd al-Rahmdn b. Jabalah al-Abnawi was killed at Asadabidh 3aa According to 'Abd al-Rahmdn b. $alih: When Muhammad the Deposed dispatched 'Abd al-Rahmdn al-Abnawi to Hamadhin, he had the two sons of al-Harashi, 'Abdallih and Ahmad, follow him with a large body of horsemen from the people of Baghdad. He commanded the two to encamp at Qasr al-Luaus 311 They were to heed and obey 'Abd al-Rahmdn and reinforce him if he needed their help.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
